archived.description: Indicates that the object has been soft-deleted, and should not be used
archived.title: Archived

template_name.description: Custom Patient Demographics with `template_name` set can be inserted into clinical notes via Form Builder. Only letters (a-z or A-Z), numbers (0-9) or underscore(_) are allowed for template name.
template_name.title: Template name

allowed_values.description: Allowed values if needed. Values must be separated by comma `,`
allowed_values.title: Allowed values
